name: Arrow Pawn Jewelry Superstore
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Garner, NC offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales, and quick cash advances without credit checks. Serves the Raleigh Research Triangle area.
description_long:
Arrow Pawn Jewelry Superstore has operated as a family-owned business for 31 years in Garner, North Carolina. Located on U.S. Highway 70 (next to Carolina BBQ), the shop serves the greater Raleigh Research Triangle including Apex, Cary, Knightdale, Wendell, Zebulon, Fuquay-Varina, Clayton, Holly Springs, and Smithfield. The business positions itself as a straightforward alternative to traditional lending for consumers facing unexpected expenses or short-term cash needs.

The company's primary service is pawn loans, where customers receive a 30-day loan against collateral items held by the shop. Loans require monthly interest payments of $22 per $100 borrowed, with the loan period extending by 30 days with each payment. The company also buys and sells inventory including gold and diamond jewelry (including broken jewelry and scrap gold), firearms (pistols, rifles, shotguns), newer game consoles, gas-powered equipment (motorcycles, 4-wheelers, go-karts), home tools, and electronics. They offer no-interest layaway options and same-day cash availability. The shop is licensed, bonded, and insured, with operating hours Monday through Saturday, 10am to 6pm.

Arrow Pawn's distinguishing characteristics include its family ownership and three-decade operational history, which suggests stability and local reputation. The company explicitly markets itself to those with poor credit histories, emphasizing the absence of credit checks, lengthy paperwork, or traditional lending stipulations. Their willingness to assess items on-site based on condition and current market value rather than providing phone quotes reflects a personalized approach. The no-interest layaway option differentiates them from typical pawn operations focused solely on loans.

However, potential borrowers should understand the cost structure: at $22 per $100 monthly, the annualized interest rate is approximately 264%, substantially higher than traditional personal loans or credit alternatives. The 90-day forfeiture policy—where unpaid interest results in loss of collateral—creates risk for borrowers unable to maintain consistent payments. The business does not disclose maximum loan amounts, term flexibility beyond the monthly structure, or redemption policies, leaving significant questions unanswered. While appropriate for genuine short-term emergencies, the lending model is designed for repeat transactions and carries substantial costs.
pros: No credit checks required; serves those with poor credit histories
Same-day cash available upon item assessment
Licensed, bonded, and insured pawn operation
No lengthy paperwork or cumbersome stipulations for loan approval
Flexible repayment allowing monthly payments in amounts borrowers can afford
31-year family-owned operation suggests stability and local reputation
No-interest layaway option for purchases available
cons: Monthly interest rate of $22 per $100 (approximately 264% annualized) is extremely high
30-day forfeiture policy results in loss of collateral if interest payments lapse 90 days
Loan amounts not disclosed; assessment only available in-person after item inspection
No transparent pricing or term information provided on website
Risk of losing personal items of sentimental or actual value if unable to maintain payments
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency short-term cash
People with items of value (jewelry, firearms, equipment) and immediate cash needs
Those facing unexpected expenses who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Individuals seeking quick liquidity willing to pay premium rates for convenience
diagnosis: Arrow Pawn is appropriate for consumers facing genuine short-term emergencies who own valuable items and cannot access traditional credit, but the 264% annualized interest rate and forfeiture policy create substantial costs and risks. This is a last-resort lending option, not a sustainable solution for ongoing cash needs.
services: 30-day pawn loans with monthly interest payments and flexible renewal
Gold and diamond jewelry purchases (including broken jewelry and scrap gold)
Firearm purchases and sales (pistols, rifles, shotguns)
Gas-powered equipment financing and sales (motorcycles, 4-wheelers, go-karts)
Home tools and electronics purchases and sales
Same-day cash loans based on collateral assessment
meta_description: Family-owned pawn shop in Garner, NC offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales, and quick cash advances without credit checks.
